workLog.entry: Chesterton's Fence: git-blamed exit-4 (added #2394 d8177c6); git grep found only CLI (SKILL.md) + tests reference the script, no production importer. Fence purpose = CLI fail-fast with install hint; collateral = crashes direct importers / pytest collection (#2524).

Relocated tiktoken guard: import sets tiktoken=None (no exit); main() exits 4 with identical message before argparse. Added tests/test_compress_markdown_import_safety.py (subprocess import probe + negative control + 2 main exit-4 tests).

Verification: uv run pytest of import-safety + word-removal + tests/context-optimizer/ = 124 passed (no pollution); CLI runs normally with tiktoken; CLI exits 4 with install hint when tiktoken blocked; ruff + mypy clean.
